name: Chocolate Sin
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully melt the chocolate over very low heat or in the top of a double boiler set over simmering water.
2. Add the vanilla, cinnamon, and salt to the melted chocolate and stir until well combined.
3. Stir in the milk until smooth.
4. Heat until very hot but not boiling.
5. Pour into 2 mugs.
6. Garnish with whipped cream or mini marshmallows, if desired.
